ddls:
CREATE TABLE "user_actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user action */,
  "step_id" INTEGER /* ID of the step or content item interacted with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action_type" INTEGER /* Type of action performed (e.g., viewed, passed, discovered) */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the action occurred */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the action occurred */,
  "day" TEXT /* Day of the week when the action occurred */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user session */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for interaction (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the user (e.g., IP-based or user-provided location) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for browser and device details */,
  "interaction_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the interaction in seconds */,
  "additional_data" TEXT /* Additional metadata related to the action (e.g., quiz score, video playback position) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_action_type FOREIGN KEY ("action_type") REFERENCES action_types ("action_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_actions_step_id FOREIGN KEY ("step_id") REFERENCES steps ("step_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "steps" (
  "step_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each step */,
  "step_description" TEXT /* Description of the step or content */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Difficulty level of the step */,
  "content_type" INTEGER /* Type of content (e.g., video, quiz, article) */,
  "parent_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent course */,
  "step_order" INTEGER /* Order of the step within the course */,
  "estimated_duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration for completing the step */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite steps or knowledge required */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the step (e.g., algebra, calculus) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the step was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the step */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("step_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_steps_difficulty_level FOREIGN KEY ("difficulty_level") REFERENCES difficulty_levels ("difficulty_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_steps_content_type FOREIGN KEY ("content_type") REFERENCES content_types ("content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, teacher, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last activity */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the user */,
  "language" TEXT /* Preferred language of the user */,
  "profile_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile image */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* User preferences (e.g., notification settings, theme) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_types" (
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action type */,
  "action_name" TEXT /* Name of the action (e.g., viewed, passed, discovered) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the action type (e.g., content interaction, navigation, settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_types" (
  "content_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the content type (e.g., video, quiz, article) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the content type */,
  "media_format" TEXT /* Media format (e.g., MP4, PDF) */,
  "interactive" INTEGER /* Indicates if the content is interactive */,
  "estimated_completion_time" INTEGER /* Estimated completion time for the content type in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "difficulty_levels" (
  "difficulty_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difficulty level */,
  "level_name" TEXT /* Name of the difficulty level (e.g., Beginner, Intermediate, Advanced) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the difficulty level */,
  "points_awarded" INTEGER /* Points awarded for completing content at this difficulty level */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite knowledge or steps required for this difficulty level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difficulty_level_id")
)
